programmes.show_name: Dora and the Lost City of Gold
programmes.show_description: (2019) Family adventure with Isabela Moner, Eva Longoria and Michael Peña. Everyone's favourite young explorer must track down her parents, who are missing in Peru.
(1973) Can Sinbad stop a master magician from reaching the Fountain of Destiny on the lost land of Lemuria and being crowned the new leader of Marabia?
(1974) Frank Langella plays a Mexican nobleman who returns home to find officials bleeding the country dry. So he dons a black mask and cape and becomes the avenging Zorro.
(1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.
(1997) Action thriller starring Pierce Brosnan and Linda Hamilton. The inhabitants of a volcano-side resort unwisely ignore a scientist's warning about its imminent eruption.
(2023) Heartwarming low-fi sci-fi comedy starring Ben Kingsley. A widower in the early stages of dementia acquires an out-of-this-world house guest when a spaceship crashes in his garden.
(2000) Jonathan Glazer's thriller with Ray Winstone, Ben Kingsley and Ian McShane. A criminal's blissful retirment is shattered by a psychopathic gangster who insists on one more job.
(2016) Wild West horror starring Kurt Russell, Lili Simmons, Patrick Wilson, Richard Jenkins and Matthew Fox. Can a posse save townsfolk from their cannibalistic abductors?

programmes.show_description: ...Curse of the Mummy: (2022) Animated family adventure. After Tad accidentally unleashes a curse - doh! - he and his friends must find the Emerald Tablet to save the world.
(2019) Fun-filled family comedy starring John Cena. A macho fireman has to babysit three impish kids after saving them from a blaze in the remote California woodlands.
(2019) Animated spy comedy caper with the voice of Will Smith. The 'world's most awesome spy' gets framed and has to go undercover as a pigeon to prove his innocence.
(1961) Sci-fi adventure based on Jules Verne's novel. Two men fleeing the US Civil War find an island inhabited by monsters (animated by Ray Harryhausen) and the mysterious Captain Nemo.
(2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.
(2007) Nicolas Cage is Marvel's soul-hunting, hot-headed-biker antihero. When Mephistopheles's son starts causing trouble in hell, Ghost Rider is forced to sort it out. With Peter Fonda.
...Massive Talent: (2022) Nicolas Cage stars as, er, Nic Cage - an unbearably talented actor caught up in a CIA investigation while trying to resurrect his ailing career. With Pedro Pascal.
